steps.t: Parchments spread upon a table outside the central keep of Starkhaven describe the dangerous authority of Ghómbok Bóro.
You should find the Weirway Gate behind the central keep of Starkhaven and <rgb=#00FF00>appraise</rgb> the danger if it is opened.
The man possessing Ghómbok Bóro's command lives to the south-east of the Weirway Gate, not far from the courtyard displaying an impressive lion statue…
The command to open the Weirway Gate is too dangerous. You should burn it in a nearby brazier.
